title: Metadata Snapshot Isolation
desc: Establishes base table metadata swap isolation boundaries, tracking snapshot lists and transaction state swaps atomically.

tasks.text: Implement serializable check-and-put swap metastore validation

title: Retry Commit Hook
desc: Implements dynamic commit-retry logic pushed in by Iceberg, allowing transactional retries when conflicts occur during catalog metadata swaps.

tasks.text: Support transactional retry policies and exponential backoffs
Write transactional metastore conflict resolver unit tests

title: Atomic Replace API
desc: Exposes powerful, atomic replace endpoints inside transaction boundaries to replace file pointers or schemas atomically.

tasks.text: Expose atomic replace API interface methods
Integrate catalog check-and-put swap payload generation

title: Layout Compaction & Rewrite
desc: Dynamic background compactor that merges small data and deletes files. Integrates with the Replace API to swap layout metadata atomically.

tasks.text: Code file layout compactors and partition bin-pack merges
Enforce delete file sequence number integrity checks during rewrites
Trigger orphan file garbage collection scans upon rewrite swaps
